name: Sequence Alignment (Needleman-Wunsch)
description: Global sequence alignment using the Needleman-Wunsch algorithm.
intuition: Build a scoring matrix where dp[i][j] = best alignment score for s1[0..i-1] and s2[0..j-1]. Score = +1 for match, -1 for mismatch, -2 for gap. Trace back from dp[m][n] to find optimal alignment.
